items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟 Small Model 3901
items.name_cn:
LO℮w℮🌟 Small Model 3901
🆕 Nappa Squeeze Handbag 👜 A refined and feminine new handbag made from soft-touch Nappa leather. This piece is a masterpiece of traditional craftsmanship, innovative research, and unique design, featuring a surprisingly lightweight crumpled body, adjustable donut chain, and soft touch handle. This small version is crafted from Nappa lambskin. *Can be worn on shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Adjustable chain strap with Anagram engraved pebbles, extra chain included to extend strap further *Magnetic snap closure *Internal zip pocket *Unlined *lo*ewe gold or silver hot stamping.
size:29*10.5*24CM All steel hardware

items.name_en: 【MCM Top Small Pillow Bag】MCM Aren Visetos Small Boston Bag
items.name_cn:
【MCM Top Small Pillow Bag】MCM Aren Visetos Small Boston Bag
This Aren Boston bag offers a new interpretation of a classic shape, paying tribute to MCM's roots in travel.
Its silhouette evokes a weekend travel bag, featuring clean lines and a convenient extended zipper. The exquisite craftsmanship features a hand-wrapped, hand-stitched, and edge-painted top handle.
Dimensions: 23*11*15cm
Strap: 102-118cm Removable/Adjustable

items.name_en: ✨【LV X TM SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25】M13805 M13085
items.name_cn:
✨【LV X TM SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25】M13805 M13085
This Speedy Bandoulière 25 gx tri-color bag renders the classic Monogram pattern in bright colors inspired by Japanese artist Takashi Murakami, showcasing the dynamic charm of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series together with the bow-shaped key pouch. Calfskin creates the Toron handle and a detachable, adjustable shoulder strap. The dazzling lock and corners draw inspiration from the brand's luggage elements.
Size: 25 x 19 x 15 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: M14194 Black & Color
items.name_cn:
M14194 Black & Color
The 2025 Takashi Murakami collaboration Nano Diane is a mini version of the Diane bag. This bag features natural leather trim, showcasing a unique round flap and a belt-style magnetic closure design, suitable for carrying essentials like a phone. It also comes with a detachable handle and a detachable shoulder strap of adjustable length, allowing for various carrying styles.
19 x 10.5 x 6 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
